tasks.label: Build VST3 (Debug)
tasks.command: cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project TestPlugin.xcodeproj -scheme "TestPlugin - VST3" -configuration Debug build

tasks.label: Build VST3 (Release)
tasks.command: cd Builds/MacOSX && xcodebuild -project TestPlugin.xcodeproj -scheme "TestPlugin - VST3" -configuration Release build
